{{CargoRelic
|name=The Barque of Dante
|class_id=22436
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=07-24
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Jul 24, 1822 AD, Delacroix created the oil painting The Barque of Dante.<br>This oil painting is a masterpiece of the Romantic painter Delacroix. Its content is based on the Divine Comedy, depicting the scene of Virgil leading the poet Dante across the river Styx in a small boat, where the souls of the dead crowded around them. The painting, using Romantic techniques, depicts people tortured by passion and death threats, making the painting a landmark of the Romantic movement.
|fame=18
|art=44
|fth=29
|civ=35
|tech=28
|ss1=Demon Minion ATK +1%
|ss2=Demon Minion ATK +2%
|ss3=Demon Minion ATK +3%
|ss4=Demon Minion ATK +5%
|ss7=Demon Minion ATK +5%<br>Demon Minion ATK +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Desertsanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Desert Sanctum: Desert Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
